sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-M2.5 produces corrupted output with --attention-backend aiter --kv-cache-dtype fp8_e4m3.
The root cause is that the fp8 aiter prefill kernel can return bf16 while the model compute dtype is fp16, which introduces a dtype mismatch in the forward pass.
Modifications
Cast t

sglang.title: [bugfix] avoid attention padding tokens computation in pcg
sglang.author: Chen-0210
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
When PCG is enabled, the attention metadata is initialized with real_num_tokens, but the input tensor still contains padded tokens. Attention backends such as FlashInfer can not handle this well, which can lead to undefined behavior, including nan value, corrupted outputs (repeated !!!!!)

The change enables automatic wrapping of user-provided schemas (JSON / schema-like inputs) into structural tags, allowi

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Mooncake] Fix thread-local CUDA context for NVLink transfers in _send_blocks
vllm.author: zhewenl
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Fix NVLink transfers failing for TP ranks > 0 when using MooncakeConnector with the MNNVL NVLink transport protocol.
Root cause
_send_blocks() runs on a ThreadPoolExecutor thread, but CUDA device selection is thread-local — a pool thread defaults to device 0 unless explicitly rebound. This m

vllm.title: [Hybrid] Simplify accepted token counting in spec decode for hybrid models
vllm.author: fuscof-ibm
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Replace the concatenate-sentinel-then-argmax approach with a simple sum of valid tokens. Since rejected tokens are marked with -1 and valid tokens are always contiguous from position 0, counting non-(-1) tokens directly gives the number of accepted tokens.
This eliminates unnecessary memory

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Disable FlashInfer CUTLASS MoE on SM121 (DGX Spark)
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The bf16 unquantized CUTLASS MoE GEMM in flashinfer <= 0.6.7 has no Relu2 template instantiation and throws Invalid activation type at moe_gemm_template_dispatch.h:1042 when running Nemotron-H (MTP drafter) on SM121. Narrow the SM120 family gate to exact SM120 so the oracle falls back to Triton on S

13.0.

New nightly image build script (image_build_torch_nightly.sh): Builds the vLLM Docker image with PYTORCH_NIGHTLY=1,
CUDA 13.0 base images, and extended torch_cuda_arch_

vllm.title: [Model Runner V2] Disable piecewise cudagraph mode fallback for eagle draft decodes
vllm.author: TheEpicDolphin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
There were two issues present with speculator's cudagraph implementation:

last_token_indices was not being padded before prefill, allowing stale values to remain in the buffer from previous runs and cause OOB errors during a gather op.
The eagle draft decodes are currently able to run in PI

vllm.title: [Attention Backend] TurboQuant: 2-bit KV cache compression with 4x capacity
vllm.author: vibhavagarwal5
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
TurboQuant adds online KV cache compression to vLLM's v1 attention backend using PolarQuant (WHT rotation + Lloyd-Max scalar quantization) for keys and uniform quantization for values. All quantization happens at store time via fused Triton kernels — no offline calibration, model changes, or

vllm.title: refactor hard coded device string in test files under tests/compile tests/quantization tests/models and tests/model_executor
vllm.author: wincent8
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR replaces hardcoded "cuda" device strings with dynamic platform checks across tests/compile, tests/quantization, tests/models, tests/model_executor and tests/basic_correctness. By utilizing current_platform.device_type, we enable these test suites to be reused across different hardware accele

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Respect VLLM_WEIGHT_OFFLOADING_DISABLE_PIN_MEMORY in prefetch offloader
vllm.author: he-yufeng
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Fixes #37672
The prefetch CPU offloader (--offload-backend prefetch) ignores VLLM_WEIGHT_OFFLOADING_DISABLE_PIN_MEMORY and unconditionally allocates pinned memory. On unified-memory systems like GH200, pinned memory consumes GPU memory, causing OOM during model loading even when the env var

vllm.title: [CI][NIXL] Fix PD CI breakage: pin nixl-cu{12,13} versions
vllm.author: ZhanqiuHu
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
nixl-cu12==1.0.1 dropped on PyPI today (19:38 UTC) and ships nixl_ep compiled against libcudart.so.12 — crashes on CUDA 13 CI runners. Our < 0.10.0 constraint only pins the meta-package, not the backends:
[2026-04-14T21:21:43Z]  + nixl==0.9.0
[2026-04-14T21:21:43Z]  + nixl-cu12==1.0.1
[2026-04-14T21
